rules.when: The task is research OR planning: a deep-research investigation, or drafting a plan/design/approach for a feature before implementation.
rules.why: TRIAD CONVERGE, not either/or: the captain wants ALL THREE profiles spawned as coordinating co-draft scouts for every research or planning task - Grok 4.5 through Pi (high), GPT-5.6 Sol through Pi (high), and Fable 5 through Pi's claude-bridge provider (max) each draft, cross-review the others' drafts, and firstmate converges them into one final synthesis. The third profile is always claude-bridge/claude-fable-5 at max effort with no alternate model route. MANDATORY TOOLS: every research and planning scout MUST use the exa and ref MCP servers for sources. Every model route stays inside Pi; the explicit xai-auth/grok-4.5 route is smoke-tested and avoids the standalone Grok harness.

rules.when: The task is UI implementation or UI polish: creating or changing user-facing screens, components, interaction design, responsive layout, accessibility presentation, visual design, HUD, or animation. Research and planning still use the triad rule instead.
rules.why: Captain wants all UI implementation and polish on GPT-5.6 Sol through Pi at Max reasoning. Pi 0.80.6 accepts --thinking max and the exact route was smoke-tested.

rules.when: The task is complex: a big or ambiguous multi-file feature, a risky or architectural refactor, deep design work, tricky debugging, or anything that requires holding many moving parts in mind.
rules.why: Captain wants non-UI complex work on GPT-5.6 Sol through Pi at Extra High reasoning; UI implementation uses the dedicated Max rule.

rules.when: The task is normal/main implementation work: a well-scoped feature, fix, test addition, or ordinary scout investigation that does not qualify as complex, research, planning, or quick under the other rules.
rules.why: Captain wants normal implementation work on GPT-5.6 Sol through Pi at Medium reasoning.

rules.when: The task is quick or lightweight: a small mechanical change, a trivial fix, or a folder/code search that needs little reasoning.
rules.why: Captain wants quick tasks and folder searches on Grok 4.5 through Pi at low reasoning (fast and cheap); the explicit xai-auth provider route is smoke-tested.
